name: vitalsync
description: VITALSYNC v2 — Dashboard de mercado en tiempo real para Binance Futures (precio, order book, liquidaciones, funding, OI).

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/server & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
